title: 2015 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_name: 2015 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_topic: 2015 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some SHOP health plans, but not all of them. Free-standing plans are also available in the SHOP Marketplace. Available 2015 free-standing dental plans and prices are shown below.

For 2014 SHOP dental plan information, visit this page

Note: The chart below will be most useful to developers, professionals, researchers, and others who want to study, analyze, and download the complete dataset of plan and price information.

See all 2015 SHOP health plans available to small businesses.

Plan data is also available for Nevada (ZIP file).

View instructions or download (ZIP file).
